- [ ] [Prerequisite 1] - Description

## ️ Success Criteria

### Functional Requirements
- [ ] Requirement 1 - Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Requirement 2 - Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Requirement 3 - Acceptance criteria

### Non-Functional Requirements
- [ ] Performance: [Specific performance criteria]
- [ ] Security: [Specific security criteria]
- [ ] Scalability: [Specific scalability criteria]
- [ ] Reliability: [Specific reliability criteria]

### Quality Gates
- [ ] All unit tests passing (>95% coverage)
- [ ] All integration tests passing
- [ ] Security scan passes with no critical issues
- [ ] Performance benchmarks met
- [ ] Code review approval from 2+ reviewers

## ️ Phase Timeline

### Week 1-2: Planning & Setup
- [ ] Detailed technical design completed
- [ ] Development environment setup
- [ ] Initial prototyping
- [ ] Team onboarding

### Week 3-6: Core Development
- [ ] Component 1 development
- [ ] Component 2 development
- [ ] Initial testing and validation

### Week 7-8: Integration & Testing
- [ ] Component integration
- [ ] End-to-end testing
- [ ] Performance testing
- [ ] Security testing

### Week 9-10: Documentation & Deployment
- [ ] Documentation completion
- [ ] Deployment preparation
- [ ] User acceptance testing
- [ ] Phase completion review

##  Team Structure

### Core Team
- **Phase Lead:** [Name] - Overall phase coordination
- **Tech Lead:** [Name] - Technical architecture and guidance
- **Backend Dev:** [Name(s)] - Backend implementation
- **Frontend Dev:** [Name(s)] - Frontend implementation
- **QA Lead:** [Name] - Quality assurance and testing
- **DevOps:** [Name] - Infrastructure and deployment

### Stakeholders
- **Product Owner:** [Name] - Requirements and acceptance
- **Security Lead:** [Name] - Security review and approval
- **Architect:** [Name] - Architecture review and guidance

### Overall Phase Progress

##  Testing Strategy

### Unit Testing
- [ ] Backend unit tests (target: >95% coverage)
- [ ] Frontend unit tests (target: >90% coverage)
- [ ] Utility function tests (target: 100% coverage)

### Integration Testing
- [ ] API integration tests
- [ ] Database integration tests
- [ ] External service integration tests

### End-to-End Testing
- [ ] Critical user journey tests
- [ ] Cross-browser compatibility tests
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness tests

### Performance Testing
- [ ] Load testing (target: [X] concurrent users)
- [ ] Stress testing (target: [X]% above normal load)
- [ ] Endurance testing (target: [X] hours stable)

##  Security Considerations

### Security Requirements
- [ ] Authentication and authorization implemented
- [ ] Input validation and sanitization
- [ ] Data encryption at rest and in transit
- [ ] Security headers implemented
- [ ] OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities addressed

### Security Testing
- [ ] Static code analysis (SAST)
- [ ] Dynamic application security testing (DAST)
- [ ] Dependency vulnerability scanning
- [ ] Penetration testing (for critical phases)

##  Documentation Requirements

### Technical Documentation
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Database schema documentation
- [ ] Deployment documentation

### User Documentation
- [ ] User guides updated
- [ ] Admin documentation updated
- [ ] Troubleshooting guides
- [ ] FAQ updated

### High-Risk Items
| Risk | Impact | Probability | Mitigation Strategy | Owner |

### Contingency Plans
- **Plan A:** [Description of primary approach]
- **Plan B:** [Description of fallback approach]
- **Plan C:** [Description of emergency approach]

##  Metrics and KPIs

### Development Metrics
- **Velocity:** [Target story points per sprint]
- **Code Quality:** [Target technical debt ratio]
- **Test Coverage:** [Target percentage]
- **Defect Rate:** [Target defects per feature]

### Business Metrics
- **Feature Adoption:** [Target adoption rate]
- **Performance Improvement:** [Target performance gain]
- **User Satisfaction:** [Target satisfaction score]

##  Phase Completion Criteria

### Technical Completion
- [ ] All components fully implemented
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Performance benchmarks met
- [ ] Security requirements satisfied
- [ ] Documentation complete

### Business Completion
- [ ] Stakeholder acceptance received
- [ ] User acceptance testing passed
- [ ] Deployment successful
- [ ] Monitoring and alerting configured
- [ ] Post-deployment validation complete
